query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_guides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN overview IS NOT NULL AND overview != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as overview_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN topThingsToDo IS NOT NULL AND topThingsToDo != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activities_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN quickFacts IS NOT NULL AND quickFacts != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as quickfacts_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN attractions IS NOT NULL AND attractions != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as attractions_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN beachesLocalRules IS NOT NULL AND beachesLocalRules != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as beaches_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN foodCafes IS NOT NULL AND foodCafes != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as food_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN faq IS NOT NULL AND faq != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as faq_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND latitude != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as coordinates_count
FROM island_guides
